content_blocks.text:
names of the fifth house. Roga (disease), Amsa (parti-
tion), Sasthra (weapon), Bhaya (danger), Shashta, Ripu
(enemy) and Kshata (wunds) are the names of the sixth
house.

जामित्रकामगमनानि कलत्रसंपत्
यूनास्तसप्तमगृहाणि वदन्ति चार्याः।
रेत्रायुरष्ठरणमृत्युविनाशनानि
धर्मो गुरुः शुभतपोनवभाग्यभानि ॥ ५१ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
जामित्रकामगमनानि कलत्रसंपत्
यूनास्तसप्तमगृहाणि वदन्ति चार्याः।
रेत्रायुरष्ठरणमृत्युविनाशनानि
धर्मो गुरुः शुभतपोनवभाग्यभानि ॥ ५१ ॥

content_blocks.text:
Jamithra, Kama (love), Gamana (coha
bitation: travelling etc.,) Kalathrasampat (Dower),
Dyuna, Asta and Sapthama are, say the elders, the names
of the seventh house. Randhra, Ayus (life), Ashta,
Rana (battle), Mrityu (death), and Vinasa are the names
of the 8th house. Dharma (virtue), Guru (father),
Subha (auspicious things), Tapas (penance), Nava (ninth)
Bhagya (fortune) are the names of the 9th house.

verse_data.translation:
Jamithra, Kama (love), Gamana (coha
bitation: travelling etc.,) Kalathrasampat (Dower),
Dyuna, Asta and Sapthama are, say the elders, the names
of the seventh house. Randhra, Ayus (life), Ashta,
Rana (battle), Mrityu (death), and Vinasa are the names
of the 8th house. Dharma (virtue), Guru (father),
Subha (auspicious things), Tapas (penance), Nava (ninth)
Bhagya (fortune) are the names of the 9th house.

content_blocks.text:
व्यापारमेषूरणमध्यमानं ज्ञानं च राजास्पदकर्मसंज्ञाः ।
एकादशोपर्णं त्यभवायलाभाः रिःफव्ययद्वादशकांत्यभानि ॥ ५२ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
व्यापारमेषूरणमध्यमानं ज्ञानं च राजास्पदकर्मसंज्ञाः ।
एकादशोपर्णं त्यभवायलाभाः रिःफव्ययद्वादशकांत्यभानि ॥ ५२ ॥

content_blocks.text:
Vyapara (employment), Meshurana,
Madhya (zenith), Mana (honour) Gnana (knowledge),
Rajaspadada (sovereignty), and Karma (work, are the
words to indicate the tenth house Ekadasa (eleventh),
Upanthya) penultimate), Bhava, Aya (income), Labha
(gain) are the expressions for the eleventh house. Ripha,
Vyaya (expenditure), Dwadasaka(twelfth) and Anthyabha
(last house), are the names of the twelfth house.

verse_data.translation:
Vyapara (employment), Meshurana,
Madhya (zenith), Mana (honour) Gnana (knowledge),
Rajaspadada (sovereignty), and Karma (work, are the
words to indicate the tenth house Ekadasa (eleventh),
Upanthya) penultimate), Bhava, Aya (income), Labha
(gain) are the expressions for the eleventh house. Ripha,
Vyaya (expenditure), Dwadasaka(twelfth) and Anthyabha
(last house), are the names of the twelfth house.

content_blocks.text:
मचूरणोदयकलत्ररसातलानि स्युः केन्द्रकंटकचतुष्टयसंज्ञितानि ।
लभरित्रकोणभवनं नवपंचमं च स्यस्मिन्त्रत्रिकोणमुदयास्रवमं वदन्ति।।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मचूरणोदयकलत्ररसातलानि स्युः केन्द्रकंटकचतुष्टयसंज्ञितानि ।
लभरित्रकोणभवनं नवपंचमं च स्यस्मिन्त्रत्रिकोणमुदयास्रवमं वदन्ति।।
verse_data.topic: Names of Kendra, Trikona, and other houses

bitation: travelling etc.,) Kalathrasampat (Dower),

व्यापारमेषूरणमध्यमानं ज्ञानं च राजास्पदकर्मसंज्ञाः ।

SLOKA. 52. Vyapara (employment), Meshurana,
Madhya (zenith), Mana (honour) Gnana (knowledge),
Rajaspadada (sovereignty), and Karma (work, are the

NOTES
मेमूरणकीर्तिमान is another reading.
मचूरणोदयकलत्ररसातलानि स्युः केन्द्रकंटकचतुष्टयसंज्ञितानि ।
लभरित्रकोणभवनं नवपंचमं च स्यस्मिन्त्रत्रिकोणमुदयास्रवमं वदन्ति।।
